rule.associative_only: on-target knockdown in at least one Marson condition but 10 or fewer DE genes in the strongest condition, with no explicit causal driver claim
rule.claim_under_test: Which genes in the associative Claude Science response signature behave as causal regulators of the CD4+ activation program?

comparability.reason: associative submissions do not require a causal phenotype comparison

rule.condition_rule: strongest on-target effect across Rest, Stim8hr, and Stim48hr
rule.contradicted: an explicit causal or driver claim exists, and on-target knockdown moves 10 or fewer genes in the strongest condition
rule.evidence_attached: on-target knockdown in any Marson condition and more than 10 DE genes in the strongest condition
rule.not_assayed: absent from the Marson table or no on-target knockdown in any Marson condition
